item.quote: Hello Devin. Hello Devin. Hello Devin. Hello Devin. Hello Devin. Hello Devin. Hello Devin. Hello Devin. Hello Devin. Hello Devin. Hello Devin. Hello Devin.
item.name: Devin Tucker

item.quote: Hi Robert. This is a test to see how well this new text to screen tool adjusts font size depending on the amount of characters in the quote.
item.attribution: - Devin Tucker / 2.08.25 / Trail Blazers vs Lakers
item.name: Devin Tucker
